paper_record.title: Resonance-enhanced super-superexchange yields giant chiral magnon splitting in rutile altermagnets
paper_record.abstract: Altermagnets host momentum-selective spin splitting and chiral-split magnonic excitations despite vanishing net magnetization, enabling spin transport without ferromagnetism. In rutile structures, establishing altermagnetism spectroscopically has been challenging, motivating the search for a rutile platform with a resolvable exchange-driven chiral magnon splitting. Here we combine hybrid-functional first-principles calculations with linear spin-wave theory to show that rutile CuF$_2$ exhibits a meV-scale splitting between magnon modes of opposite chirality along momentum directions dictated by its $d$-wave altermagnetic symmetry. The splitting originates from an anomalously strong long-range super-superexchange channel Cu--F$\cdots$F--Cu, which enhances the symmetry-allowed difference between seventh-neighbour exchanges, $J_{7b} - J_{7a}$, controlling the chiral-mode splitting. We identify an orbital-resonance mechanism: energetic alignment between Cu $3d_{z^2}$ and F $2p_z$ states strengthens virtual hopping along the Cu--F$\cdots$F--Cu path and amplifies the anisotropic long-range exchange. Rutile CuF$_2$ therefore provides an ideal platform to validate rutile altermagnetism and suggests an orbital-energy description for engineering large chiral magnon splittings in insulating altermagnets.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 研究发现金红石型 CuF2 具有由轨道共振增强的超-超交换作用驱动的巨手性磁振子分裂。
one_sentence_summary.en: Discovery of giant chiral magnon splitting in rutile CuF2 driven by resonance-enhanced super-superexchange.

problem.zh: 金红石型交错磁体（如 RuO2）的磁振子手性分裂通常极小，难以在实验光谱中观测和验证。
problem.en: Chiral magnon splitting in rutile altermagnets is typically too small to be resolved experimentally, hindering spectroscopic confirmation.

approach.zh: 结合杂化泛函第一性原理计算与线性磁振子理论，对比分析一系列过渡金属氟化物的交换相互作用和磁振子能谱。
approach.en: Combined hybrid-functional first-principles calculations with linear spin-wave theory to analyze exchange interactions and magnon spectra across transition-metal difluorides.

main_takeaway.zh: CuF2 在特定动量方向表现出毫电子伏特量级的巨手性磁振子分裂，这源于 Cu 3d 与 F 2p 轨道能量对齐增强了长程超-超交换作用。
main_takeaway.en: CuF2 exhibits meV-scale chiral magnon splitting due to an orbital-resonance mechanism that amplifies long-range super-superexchange interactions.

why_it_matters.zh: 该研究为验证金红石型交错磁性提供了理想的实验平台，并提出了通过轨道能量工程设计大分裂磁振子的通用准则。
why_it_matters.en: It provides a clear experimental platform to validate rutile altermagnetism and establishes a design principle for engineering large magnon splittings via orbital alignment.

reason.zh: 揭示了增强交错磁体特征信号的物理机制，并预言了具有显著实验特征的新材料。
reason.en: Reveals the physical mechanism for enhancing altermagnetic signatures and predicts a new material with prominent experimental features.

reason.zh: 该研究针对交错磁体这一前沿热点，提出了新颖的机制并具有明确的实验可验证性。
reason.en: The study addresses a hot topic in altermagnetism with a novel mechanism and clear experimental testability.
